title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
